backstory.original: A consummate showman and performer, Lark loves the spotlight, but his desire for attention might end up getting him killed. Hunted by mysterious enemies with deadly intent, Lark has nevertheless managed to forge a degree of notoriety and a small fan following as a bard, all while evading his pursuers and any questions about who is hunting him and why. Lark left his old band of performers and initially joined up with the Fallbacks in order to surround himself with powerful protectors. He didn't expect to catch feelings for the group in the process, but he's adjusting. The show must go on, after all.
backstory.display: 拉克是一位完美的表演者和艺人，他热爱聚光灯，但他渴望得到关注这点可能会最终害死他。有一群神秘的敌人在搜寻拉克，想置他于死地，尽管如此，拉克作为一位吟游诗人还是有了一定的名声，并拥有了一小群粉丝，在这期间他避开了追杀者，而对于谁在追杀他以及原因是什么的问题，他同样避而不答。拉克离开了他之前的表演团队，他加入“后备队”最初的目的是让自己身边有强大的保护者。他没想到在这个过程中会对这个团队产生感情，但他在适应。毕竟，表演必须继续。

description.original: Lark mocks a random enemy for one hit.
description.display: 拉克嘲讽一名随机敌人，造成一次打击。

longDescription.original: Lark attacks a random enemy, dealing 1 hit. Lark prefers to attack enemies he hasn't attacked yet.
longDescription.display: 拉克攻击一名随机敌人，造成 1 次打击。拉克会优先攻击他没有攻击过的敌人。

description.original: Lark delivers 1 ultimate hit to enemies and makes them vulnerable to additional damage.
description.display: 拉克对敌人造成 1 次杀招打击，并使他们更容易受到额外的伤害。

longDescription.original: Lark's powerful performance deals 1 ultimate hit to all enemies and charms them, making them more susceptible to additional damage.
longDescription.display: 拉克极具震撼力的表演对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招打击，并使他们着迷，从而更容易受到额外的伤害。

description.desc: Uggie joins the party, starting next to Lark unless she's already in the formation next to another Fallbacks Champion. Uggie increases the damage of all non-adjacent Champions by $amount%.
乌吉加入探险队，并将默认与拉克相邻，除非她已在阵型中并与另一位“后备队”勇士相邻。乌吉会使所有非相邻的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。
Lark increases the damage of all Champions that aren't in the first or last column by $amount%.
拉克使所有不在最前或最后一列中的勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Lark increases the damage of Champions that aren't at the front or back of the formation.
tipText.display: 拉克会使不处在阵型最前或最后列的勇士伤害提升。

description.desc: Uggie's buff is increased by $amount% when Lark is in the formation.
当拉克在阵型中时，乌吉的增益提高 $amount%

When Uggie is with Lark, and at least 50% of the area's quest requirements are met, Lark sprints off to the next area, leaving the formation (and Uggie) behind. When the formation catches up to him, Lark has already antagonized several enemies, spawning $lark_bardic_amount $(if has_bonus)enemies$(fi)$(if not has_bonus)enemy$(fi) in the next area before the formation even arrives.
当乌吉跟着拉克，并且当前区域至少 50% 的任务要求已经完成时，拉克会冲到下一个区域，把阵型（和乌吉）甩在身后。当阵型追上拉克时，他已经激怒数名敌人，并早在阵型到达前就在下一个区域中刷新出 $lark_bardic_amount 名$(if has_bonus)敌人$(fi)$(if not has_bonus)敌人$(fi)了。

tipText.original: Lark can't wait to keep going. He dashes off to the next area before the current one is complete, and spawns a number of enemies by the time the formation catches up to him.
tipText.display: 拉克迫不及待想继续前进了。还没等当前区域完成，他就冲到下一个区域去了。等阵型追上他时，他会刷新出一批敌人。

description.desc: When Lark attacks an enemy and does not defeat it, the enemy gains the Charmed debuff. Charmed enemies take $amount___2% additional damage for each Charmed debuff that Lark has applied in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $max_stacks stacks. If Lark attacks an enemy he has already Charmed, it still increments his Charmed count for the area. Once Lark applies his maximum number of Charmed stacks in an area, he switches over to use his crossbow, named Last Resort.
当拉克攻击一名敌人但没有将其击败时，该敌人会获得“魅惑”减益。在当前区域内，拉克每施加一层“魅惑”减益效果，被魅惑的敌人会额外受到 $amount___2% 的伤害，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 层。如果拉克攻击一名已经被他魅惑的敌人，他在该区域内的“魅惑”计数仍会增加。一旦拉克在一个区域内施加的“魅惑”层数达到上限，他会改用他那把名为“死斗”的十字弩进行攻击。
Lark strums a few notes on his lute, increasing his Charmed stack cap to 20 for the rest of the area, dealing one ultimate hit to all enemies, and applying the Charmed debuff to all of them.
拉克用他的鲁特琴弹奏几个音符，使他的“魅惑”堆叠层数上限在该区域的剩余时间内提升至 20，同时对所有敌人造成一次杀招命中，并对所有敌人施加“魅惑”减益。
Lark increases the damage of Devil May Care by $amount% for each unique class in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一个独特的职业，拉克会使“无所顾忌”的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Lark isn't above using others to his own benefit.
specializationDescription.display: 拉克从不觉得为了自己的利益利用别人有什么不妥。

description.desc: Lark increases the damage of Devil May Care by $amount% for each Fallback Champion and/or Champion with a Charisma score of 13 or lower in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名“后备队”勇士和/或魅力值小于等于 13 的勇士，拉克会使“无所顾忌”的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Lark doesn't like to share the spotlight.
specializationDescription.display: 拉克不喜欢别人抢他的风头。

description.desc: Lark increases the damage of Devil May Care by $amount% for each Tiefling and/or Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名提夫林和/或邪恶勇士，拉克会使“无所顾忌”的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: It's a little too easy to convince Lark to participate in something that is absolutely nefarious.
specializationDescription.display: 说服拉克参与某件绝对邪恶的事简直毫无难度。

description.display: 艺术家的工作日是永远不会结束的。

description.original: I am the picture of good cheer and happiness.
description.display: 我是快乐与幸福的象征。

description.original: I'm at least going to get an amazing song out of this.
description.display: 至少我能从这当中写出一首很棒的歌来。

description.original: That book is foul, and the otyugh is probably poisoned.
description.display: 那本书污秽不堪，而这食腐兽很可能被毒害了。

description.original: What have you done this time?
There are far fewer expectations placed on you when you're alone.
description.display: 当你一个人的时候，身上承担的期望就会少很多。

description.original: I've always wanted to do the Waterdeep After Dark tour.
description.display: 我一直想体验一下深水城夜游。

description.original: Let's see where the night takes us.
description.display: 我们来看看今晚会发生什么。

description.original: The flowers should be arriving shortly. They do a lot to brighten up the place.
description.display: 花儿应该很快就会送到。它们能让这个地方亮堂起来。

description.original: You want me to join your ethical burglary band?
description.display: 你们想让我加入你们这个有道德的盗窃团伙？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lark's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I'll compose a drinking song to mark the occasion.
description.display: 我要写一首饮酒歌来纪念这个日子。
这次我是照着指示做的！

description.original: On a side note, I hate all of you and I'm never speaking to you again.
description.display: 顺便说一句，我讨厌你们所有人，我再也不会和你们说话了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: A consummate showman and performer, Lark loves the spotlight, but his desire for attention might end up getting him killed. Hunted by mysterious enemies with deadly intent, Lark has nevertheless managed to forge a degree of notoriety and a small fan following as a bard, all while evading his pursuers and any questions about who is hunting him and why. Lark left his old band of performers and initially joined up with the Fallbacks in order to surround himself with powerful protectors. He didn't expect to catch feelings for the group in the process, but he's adjusting. The show must go on, after all.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Lark is a Support, Speed, and Debuff Champion who boosts the damage of Champions in the middle of his formation. He favors sharp words over sharp weapons, but when all else fails, he’ll reach for his crossbow, Last Resort. This impulsive showman has a habit of running off on his own and landing himself in trouble.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 拉克是一位完美的表演者和艺人，他热爱聚光灯，但他渴望得到关注这点可能会最终害死他。有一群神秘的敌人在搜寻拉克，想置他于死地，尽管如此，拉克作为一位吟游诗人还是有了一定的名声，并拥有了一小群粉丝，在这期间他避开了追杀者，而对于谁在追杀他以及原因是什么的问题，他同样避而不答。拉克离开了他之前的表演团队，他加入“后备队”最初的目的是让自己身边有强大的保护者。他没想到在这个过程中会对这个团队产生感情，但他在适应。毕竟，表演必须继续。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 拉克是一名支援、速度和减益型勇士，他会提升处于阵型中间位置勇士的伤害。比起锋利的武器，他更喜欢用尖锐的言辞进行攻击，但当其他手段都失效时，他会拿起他的十字弩——“死斗”。这位冲动的表演者有独自行动的习惯，而这也经常让他自己陷入麻烦。
